response.overview: Episode 1: "The Love Between a Tall Woman and a Short Man" Yuko, a model, is 170 cm tall, while Heita, the president of the agency she belongs to, is 150 cm tall. This mismatched pair is like a dog and a monkey, oil and water; their personalities clash completely, and they constantly bicker. Neither of them has any romantic feelings for the other, but there is one thing about Heita that attracts Yuko. What ultimate choice will Yuko make? Episode 2: "Sex Complex" Mika has a phobia of sex. It stems from her first sexual experience. Her complex about sex began the moment she became intimate with her first love, whom she was dating at the time. She desperately wants to overcome this complex, but she doesn't have the courage to go to the hospital and suffers alone. As she frantically searches the internet for a way to cure her complex, she accidentally discovers the name of her first love, Hitoshi.
response.title: Moedel ~Moe × Model~
